'''Neutra Four''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Neutra system/Legends|Neutra system]], located in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region's]] [[Oeiros sector/Legends|Oeiros sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] forcibly seized Neutra Four during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], leading one native, [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Rad Torlent]], to join the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] as a [[junior officer]].<ref name="marvel45" />
